creator: pmn@bakarika.net
text:
Hello,

Quoting Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>:
> Maintainer of lang/gambit-c,
> Please note that PR ports/158670 has just been submitted.
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/158670

I agree with this patch.
Thank you for applying it.


Cheers,

-- 
This is not a signature.
